fields.description: Internal grouping key. For original-rooted items: the original BOQ row's boq_row_uid. For New-Item-only items: the variation line's own boq_row_uid. The allocator uses this to look up the item's ordered scope list.
fields.label: Item Key

fields.description: Cumulative qty done for this item as of this bill, across original + any variation scopes. The allocator splits this left-to-right across scopes (original first, then variation 1, then variation 2 ...). Must be >= sum of cumulative qty already billed across this item's scopes (monotonic).
fields.label: Cum. Qty (this bill)

fields.description: Sum of sanctioned qty across all scopes for this item (original estimated_qty + any Additional Qty variation lines). Reference only; deviation enforcement is per-scope on the generated items table.
fields.label: Total Sanctioned
